task_completion.description: Select the CSV file for import
task_completion.visual_evidence: An open file dialog or import wizard showing the selection of '/home/ga/Documents/festival_plan.csv'.

task_completion.description: Map the Name, Duration, and Start columns during import
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import mapping dialog showing the CSV columns (Name, Duration, Start) being explicitly mapped to the corresponding project task fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the tasks are successfully imported into the project schedule
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main project view (task list or Gantt chart) displaying the imported tasks, specifically showing 'Stage Construction' with a duration of 3 days and 'Sound Check'.

task_completion.description: Establish a Finish-to-Start dependency between Stage Construction and Sound Check
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual link (arrow) in the Gantt chart connecting the end of 'Stage Construction' to the start of 'Sound Check', or the 'Predecessors' column for 'Sound Check' containing the row number corresponding to 'Stage Construction'.

task_completion.description: Save the project as a Microsoft Project XML file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog showing the file path '/home/ga/Projects/festival_project.xml' with the file type set to Microsoft Project XML.

integrity.description: The agent used the project management application's GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a project management application (e.g., ProjectLibre) rather than a terminal window running scripts or commands to generate the XML.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a genuine project management tool, not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of project management interface elements like a Gantt chart, task spreadsheet, and scheduling menus, rather than raw XML or CSV text being edited in a text editor.

integrity.description: The dependency and task data were created via the application interface, not by manually typing XML code.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dependency is shown being created using the application's linking tools, task properties dialog, or predecessor column.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input CSV: /home/ga/Documents/festival_plan.csv. Output file: /home/ga/Projects/festival_project.xml. Expected tasks include 'Site Survey', 'Permit Application', 'Vendor Contracts', 'Stage Construction' (duration: 3 days), 'Sound Check', and 'Festival Opening'. A Finish-to-Start dependency must be set where 'Stage Construction' is the predecessor and 'Sound Check' is the successor.
